meaning: adj.微不足道的,琐碎的n.便壶
examples: Take me to the potty. I need to tinkle.
Please stop playing with your baby and go potty.
Poop and pee have lots of germs in them, so we need to wash our hands every time after we go potty.
Alright, time to get past the potty talk and get to the heart of the issue.
"Now she engages with me and other kids, writes letters and is potty trained, " her mother says.
